final:
module top_module (
        input a,
        input b,
        input c,
  wire temp1_( ~a & ~b & ~c ) |
				( ~a & ~b & c ) |
				( a & ~b & ~c ) |
				( a & b & ~c ) = ( ~a & ~b & ~c ) |
				( ~a & ~b & c ) |
				( a & ~b & ~c ) |
				( a & b & ~c );
  wire temp2_( a & b & c ) = ( a & b & c );
  assign g = temp1_( ~a & ~b & ~c ) |
				( ~a & ~b & c ) |
				( a & ~b & ~c ) |
				( a & b & ~c ) | temp2_( a & b & c ) ;

endmodule
